The '''Alzoc III Base''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military base on the arctic planet of [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] were [[Mission at Alzoc III (Empire Reborn)|assigned]] to infiltrate the base. Ors deployed Katarn in a supply crate on a landing pad, from which he took the outside defenses by surprise. Most of the base's staff, including a [[Reborn]], were killed.
